name: Injected Built-in Windows Tool Modifying DSRM Admin Logon Behavior
description: Detects the creation or modification of the DSRM (Directory Services Restore Mode) admin logon behavior in the Windows registry by a possibly injected built-in Windows Tool. Can be used by an attacker to bypass or limit access as part of persistence or defense evasion techniques.

filterSets.name: Creation or Modification of DSRM Admin Logon Behavior via Commandline

author: Mohammed Malubay
